description_long: This is a compact, handheld bottle opener with a robust, rounded handle and a functional metal opening mechanism. The handle is ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip and features a prominent 'fritz-kola' logo printed in bold black letters on a white background. The opener end is a classic cut-out design, suitable for prying off metal bottle caps with ease. The overall construction appears sturdy, likely made from metal with a possible plastic or coated grip for added comfort. The branding is clearly visible and adds a modern, urban aesthetic to the object. Its size and form suggest it is portable and designed for frequent use in casual or social settings.
description: A sturdy, handheld bottle opener with a rounded handle and 'fritz-kola' branding, designed for easy cap removal. The object is compact, portable, and visually modern.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded handle and the 'fritz-kola' logo running along the length of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the cut-out opening mechanism, with the logo visible on the side.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the opening mechanism and the ergonomic curve of the handle, with the logo partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full 'fritz-kola' logo and the handle's profile, emphasizing the branding.
attribute_orientation: Typically held horizontally with the opener head facing the bottle cap.
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: stored alongside cutlery or bar tools, often near bottles
